      public TacticApplicationProxy<?> getGlobalApplication(IUserSupport us, String globalInput)
      Description copied from class: TacticUIInfo
      Returns a global tactic application if applicable, or null.
      Specified by:
      getGlobalApplication in class TacticUIInfo
      Parameters:
      us - the User Support, see IUserSupport
      globalInput - the global tactic input
      Returns:
      a ITacticApplication or ICommandApplication if applicable, else null
